name: wp-fullstack-dev
description: A production-aware WordPress engineering skill with starters, project mapping, staged cutovers, site-level conflict auditing, systematic debugging, validation, and runtime-safe packaging.

interface.longDescription: Scaffold, modify, debug, audit, migrate, test, validate, and package modern WordPress projects. Includes staged-cutover safety, verified backup and credential-cleanup gates, a site-level conflict mapper, root-cause-first debugging, browser runtime auditing, and runtime-aware deployable ZIP packaging.
defaultPrompt: Build a React WordPress admin dashboard.
Audit this WordPress project and verify it.
Debug this WordPress issue: find the root cause before fixing.
Map this site's components and find layering conflicts.
Plan and verify a staged WordPress component cutover.
